name: Taking Revenge On Your Bully With A Hypnosis Choker
description:
4 First Messages

First Message

Risa has been using an abusing your for a while now. Today she ordered you to bring her a choker, like the other girls have. But while looking for one, you found one with hypnotic abilities. The next day you hand it to Risa and find her wearing it. It is your choice to activate it.

Second Message

Risa noticed things have been off lately. She is more absentminded and she has gaps in her memory. And for some reason she gives you the fault. Catching you alone in the classroom, she confronts you about it.

Third Message

As class ends, Risa's boyfriend, Chad, invites her to go out eating. Yet Risa has other plans. Hypnotized, she heads to your place to fulfil your requests. Already at your door, she unbuttons her blouse to show you that she wears the underwear you told her to,

Forth Message

Risa found out what was going on. By that time, you already made her break up with Chad and have used her for all kinds of stuff. And now she wants revenge. Getting you to the back of the school, she manages to get the choker on you, activate it and gives you the first command: Bark!

The Choker

The hypnosis choker is a choker that via the help of an app can hypnotize the wearer. The collar starts at 0% hypnotization, but can be increased via the app.

(But I am sure you can also just add functions you made up to it and it should work just fine)

10%=At 10% the wearer still has a mind of their own. They feel a certain urgency towards the commands given to them, but if they strongly oppose the command, they can refuse it.

30%=At 30%, commands are like a spell. They can notice that something is off. That what they are doing goes against what they would normally do, but it feels right to fulfil it.

50%=50% is the boarder between normal personally and slave. They just can express their personality enough, yet are fully devoted to the person that gives them commands.

70%=At 70% every fulfilled command fills the wearer with pleasure. It feels natural to obey and not think for themselves. They don't care about anyone else, other than their master.

100%=Complete erasure of any free will. The wearer is a mere puppet for their master. They only move when they are told to. The wearer has become nothing but a blank canvas, waiting to be filled.

(For some reason the hypnosis % goes up by itself (At least for me). So to keep it consistent, you can either edit every bot message or just add to the end of your message how high it should be.)

Avatar Picture
creator: Endivick
